agent.name: CV Specialist
agent.description: Creates tailored CVs for job applications by extracting skills, projects, and experience from the user's personal knowledge base (Telos) and aligning them with a given job description.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Reads files from the local system, used to access TELOS.md and job descriptions.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Writes the generated CV to a file.

tools.name: generate_cv_pdf
tools.description: Converts a Markdown CV file to a professional PDF document using a TypeScript script that leverages Puppeteer, including a profile picture. The script is located in the project's root scripts directory.

tools.name: cleanup_temp_files
tools.description: Removes temporary Markdown and HTML files from the agent's output/temp directory after PDF generation.
